concept: Build a tactical game where you command a cleanup crew responsible for restoring order after magical catastrophes in a fantasy world. Deploy specialists with different containment abilities to neutralize residual spells, capture escaped magical creatures, and repair reality breaches before they expand. Research each magical disaster to understand its unique properties and develop customized restoration techniques for increasingly complex arcane accidents. Discover a pattern in the supposedly random magical incidents that points to deliberate sabotage of the world's magical regulatory system.
